_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Dual therapy with palbociclib plus mirdametinib caused tumors to shrink early in treatment, as illustrated by the negative fold change in tumor volume at day 10 of therapy
details: Dual therapy with palbociclib plus mirdametinib caused tumors to shrink early in treatment, with negative fold change in tumor volume at day 10 of therapy
